basic_details.job_title: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.short_information: Anna University has released an official notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant Posts. Interested and eligible candidates can apply Offline by sending the application form to the official address. The last date to submit the application is 04-08-2026. In this article, you'll find the Project Assistant recruitment details, including eligibility criteria, age limit, salary structure, selection process, application procedure, and direct links to the official notification and application form download.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: UG (or) PG degrees in specified engineering disciplines.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical, Production, Industrial, Manufacturing, Robotics and Automation, Mechatronics, Aeronautical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Information Technology or Computer Science and Engineering with strong programming skills (Python/C++), knowledge of embedded systems. M.E./M.Tech. In Industrial Engineering, Quality Engineering and Management, Computer Integrated manufacturing, Manufacturing Systems management, Engineering Design, Robotics, Mechatronics, Control and Automation, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Embedded Systems and Technology, Control and Instrumentation Engineering, VLSI Design and Embedded Systems, Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, Computer Science and Engineering Desirable skills include experience in sensor integration (LiDAR, cameras), and navigation algorithms. Knowledge of image processing and machine learning for object/area recognition.

selection_process: Shortlisting based on eligibility criteria Interview
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: .
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-08-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Anna University Project Assistant Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the Anna University Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download Anna University Project Assistant Job 2026 Notification PDF

Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: B.E./B.Tech. in Mechanical, Production, Industrial, Manufacturing, Robotics and Automation, Mechatronics, Aeronautical Engineering, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Electrical and Electronics Engineering, Electronics and Instrumentation Engineering, Information Technology or Computer Science and Engineering with strong programming skills (Python/C++), knowledge of embedded systems. M.E./M.Tech. In Industrial Engineering, Quality Engineering and Management, Computer Integrated manufacturing, Manufacturing Systems management, Engineering Design, Robotics, Mechatronics, Control and Automation, Electronics and Communication Engineering, Embedded Systems and Technology, Control and Instrumentation Engineering, VLSI Design and Embedded Systems, Artificial Intelligence, Information Technology, Computer Science and Engineering Desirable skills include experience in sensor integration (LiDAR, cameras), and navigation algorithms. Knowledge of image processing and machine learning for object/area recognition.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Download the application form from the official website: . Fill the application form carefully with correct information. Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates. Check all details carefully before submission. Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed. Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 04-08-2026. Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Anna University Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at Anna University?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the Project Assistant position is 04-08-2026. Ensure your application reaches the specified address before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The Project Assistant position offers a consolidated salary of Rs. 25,000/- per month. This is a fixed remuneration for the duration of the project.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum educational qualifications required for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a B.E./B.Tech. or M.E./M.Tech. degree in specific engineering disciplines as detailed in the notification. Strong programming skills and knowledge of embedded systems are also required.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process is offline. You need to send a filled-in application form along with self-attested photocopies of relevant documents by post to the address mentioned in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any specific instructions regarding fees, if applicable.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting candidates based on their eligibility criteria, followed by an interview. Only shortlisted candidates will be called for the interview.

faq.question: Q7. What is the job type for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based job. The recruitment is for a specific research project at Anna University.

faq.question: Q8. What is the project title for which the recruitment is being done?
faq.answer: The project title is "Sustainable Autonomous Multi-Robot Cleaning System to curtail Hospital Acquired Infection (CMRG2400477)".

faq.question: Q9. What is the total number of vacancies available?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the post of Project Assistant in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article. Always refer to the official sources for the most accurate information.
